data.title: Add Phase 1.5 External Dependencies block reader + story generator sections to preplanning SKILL.md
data.description:
## Testing Mode
UPDATE

## TDD Requirement
Task 1 (bb8f-cde2) wrote failing structural tests: test_phase_1_5_section_heading_exists, test_flag_check_reference_present, test_manual_awaiting_user_tag_referenced, test_idempotency_check_instruction_present, test_contract_doc_path_referenced. This task makes those specific tests GREEN (the Refusal Gate tests from Task 1 remain RED until Task 3).

## Implementation Notes

### Where to insert in SKILL.md

Insert after the Lightweight Mode Gate section (after line ~151 in SKILL.md) and before Phase 1 Step 2 (Audit Existing Children). The new sections are:

1. **Flag check** (inline with Phase 1, before Step 2):
   Add a guard block that reads `planning.external_dependency_block_enabled` using the shared helper from bec5-7f84. When flag is off (or helper unavailable), skip all External Dependencies processing and proceed directly to Step 2. When on, set EXTERNAL_DEP_BLOCK_ENABLED=true for downstream phases.

2. **Phase 1.5: External Dependencies Block Reading** (new phase, before Phase 2):
   - Read the parent epic's description looking for a `## External Dependencies` block conforming to the contract at `plugins/dso/docs/contracts/external-dependencies-block.md`
   - For each entry with handling=claude_auto: create an automation story as a standard child of the epic (same phase 4 story creation flow)
   - For each entry with handling=user_manual: create a story tagged manual:awaiting_user; the story's Done Definitions must include:
     - The entry's instructions field verbatim
     - The verification_command if present, OR a confirmation-token prompt if verification_command is omitted
   - **Idempotency**: Before creating any story for a block entry, check existing children via `.claude/scripts/dso ticket deps <epic-id>` for any story already tagged manual:awaiting_user with a title matching the entry name. If found, skip creation to avoid duplicates.

### Naming conventions in SKILL.md
- Section heading: `## Phase 1.5: External Dependencies Block Reading (/dso:preplanning)`
- Flag variable referenced: `planning.external_dependency_block_enabled`
- Contract doc referenced: `plugins/dso/docs/contracts/external-dependencies-block.md`
- Tag name referenced: `manual:awaiting_user`

### Behavioral testing standard constraint
SKILL.md is a non-executable LLM instruction file. Tests from Task 1 verify structural boundaries only (section headings, referenced paths, tag names). Behavioral correctness of LLM parsing is not deterministically testable — this is expected and correct per Rule 5.

### Flag-gate invariant
When planning.external_dependency_block_enabled is off: Phase 1.5 must not execute. All preplanning behavior must match pre-feature baseline. This satisfies DD4.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] validate.sh passes with no new shim violations or referential integrity breaks
  Verify: bash .claude/scripts/dso validate.sh --ci 2>/dev/null | tail -5
- [ ] SKILL.md contains Phase 1.5 section heading
  Verify: grep -q '## Phase 1.5: External Dependencies Block Reading' plugins/dso/skills/preplanning/SKILL.md
- [ ] SKILL.md references planning.external_dependency_block_enabled
  Verify: grep -q 'planning.external_dependency_block_enabled' plugins/dso/skills/preplanning/SKILL.md
- [ ] SKILL.md references the contract doc path
  Verify: grep -q 'plugins/dso/docs/contracts/external-dependencies-block.md' plugins/dso/skills/preplanning/SKILL.md
- [ ] SKILL.md references manual:awaiting_user tag name in Phase 1.5
  Verify: grep -q 'manual:awaiting_user' plugins/dso/skills/preplanning/SKILL.md
- [ ] SKILL.md includes idempotency check instruction in Phase 1.5
  Verify: grep -q -i 'idempoten\|duplicate\|already.*tagged\|existing.*manual:awaiting_user' plugins/dso/skills/preplanning/SKILL.md
- [ ] Task 1 structural tests that cover Phase 1.5 sections now pass (GREEN)
  Verify: bash plugins/dso/skills/preplanning/tests/test_external_dep_block_reader.sh 2>&1 | grep -E 'PASS|FAIL' | grep -v 'refusal_gate' | grep FAIL | wc -l | awk '{exit ($1 > 0)}'
- [ ] No new external references added to SKILL.md that do not resolve to existing files
  Verify: bash plugins/dso/hooks/check-referential-integrity.sh plugins/dso/skills/preplanning/SKILL.md 2>/dev/null; test $? -eq 0
- [ ] SKILL.md shim compliance (no direct plugin/ paths)
  Verify: bash .claude/scripts/dso validate.sh --ci 2>/dev/null | grep -c 'shim' | awk '{exit ($1 > 0)}'
